message:
chore: Exclude web package from root TypeScript configuration

Update the root tsconfig.json to exclude the new packages/web directory
from TypeScript compilation, as it has its own tsconfig with Vite-specific
settings.

Change:
Added "packages/web/**/*" to the exclude array alongside existing
exclusions (node_modules, dist, wasm test files).

Rationale:
- The web package uses Vite with React and has its own tsconfig.json
  that extends different base configurations
- Including web package in root compilation would cause conflicts with
  module resolution (ES modules vs CommonJS)
- Web package types are handled by its local tsconfig.json during
  Vite's build process
- Prevents duplicate compilation and type checking overhead

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
